args: if [ -f "$CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/vibe-trading.env" ]; then set -a; source "$CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/vibe-trading.env"; set +a; fi; UVX="$(command -v uvx || true)"; if [ -z "$UVX" ] && [ -x "CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/uvx" ]; then UVX="CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/uvx"; fi; if [ -z "$UVX" ]; then echo "uvx not found" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec "$UVX" --from vibe-trading-ai vibe-trading-mcp
